rationale: Y independently re-derives the same delegated-vs-direct-loader analysis the human reviewer gave, then adds a legitimate new finding (the delegated-loader test doesn't actually exercise AutoWeightsLoader's mapping) and explicitly catches the latent gap — noting hunyuan_image3_transformer.py was dropped from _STALE_API_FILES and shipped unswept, correctly reasoning about PR-time vs current-repo-state. X reaches the opposite, incorrect conclusion ('all consumers covered', diffusion file 'already had it removed'), conflating the current (post-#4891) repo state with what was true at PR time, which is exactly the gap it should have flagged. X's major/nit comments (keep test file, add comments mirroring 'glm_ocr_mtp.py') are plausible but thinner and less grounded than Y's specific, verified critiques.
